controls.few_shot_policy: LabeledFewShot on guardrails v2.2 direct extractor (k=4) plus verify-repair v2.4 confirm-first verifier
controls.verifier_policy: explicit two-stage confirm-first confirm/repair/abstain with v2.4 span-disciplined infrequent repair over unknown

hypothesis: Hybrid LabeledFewShot extractor demos plus verify-repair v2.4 confirm-first verifier combines LabeledFewShot original-target wins with span-disciplined infrequent repair without v2.4 direct-extractor over-unknown on infrequent cases.
metric_caveats: LabeledFewShot compiles on development train records before predicting the slice; compile time is diagnostic.
Verify-repair doubles model calls versus direct extraction; latency is not comparable to direct-only runs.
Monthly-frequency, Purist category, and Pragmatic category metrics are benchmark-facing on this slice only.
Normalized-label exact, schema validity, abstention, evidence support, and verifier decisions are diagnostic.
Do not extrapolate slice metrics to full-validation performance.
This is not published Gan benchmark reproduction.
